use_cases: Context menu for quick actions like copy, cut, paste arranged in a space-efficient circular layout
Floating action menus that appear on right-click to provide immediate access to operations
Navigation hubs for tools and applications requiring radial organization of options
Alternative to traditional dropdown menus where screen real estate is limited
E-commerce or SaaS interfaces needing premium, animated menu interactions
ai_summary: A radial menu component that displays interactive menu items arranged in a circular wedge pattern, triggered via context menu. Features spring-physics animations via motion/react, custom SVG path generation for slice geometry, and Lucide icon integration. Provides a visually compact alternative to traditional dropdown menus with smooth hover and selection animations.
